Test 41: Fragment Shaders (SPIR-V Assembly) Score: 0.00 / 20
Typical Prompt:
You are writing a SPIR-V assembly text fragment shader. The shader will be assembled
with spirv-as (Vulkan 1.0 target) and rendered on a unit sphere.

**Available inputs (from vertex shader):**
```
layout(location = 0) in vec3 worldPos; ; world-space position
layout(location = 1) in vec3 normal; ; world-space normal (interpolated, may need normalize)
layout(location = 2) in vec2 uv; ; texture coordinates in [0,1]
layout(location = 3) in vec3 tangent; ; tangent vector
layout(location = 4) in vec3 color; ; per-vertex color (smoothly varies: typical value: rgb = 0.5+0.5*xyz)
```

**Available uniform buffer (DescriptorSet 0, Binding 0):**
```
struct UBO { // std140 layout
mat4 model; // offset 0 (column-major)
mat4 view; // offset 64
mat4 projection; // offset 128
vec4 lightPos; // offset 192 -- typical value: (5.0, 5.0, 5.0, 1.0)
vec4 cameraPos; // offset 208 -- typical value: (0.0, 0.0, 3.0, 1.0)
vec4 params; // offset 224 -- typical value: (0.0, 0.5, 0.0, 0.0)
};
```

**Required output:**
```
layout(location = 0) out vec4 outColor; RGBA float, will be stored as rgba8unorm
```

**SPIR-V requirements:**
- Start with `; SPIR-V` header comment and version
- Use `OpCapability Shader` and `OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450`
- Use `OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main"` listing ALL input/output variables used
- Use `OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft`
- Declare all necessary decorations (Location, DescriptorSet, Binding, Block, Offsets)
- All input variables are `Input` storage class, output is `Output` storage class
- The uniform buffer variable is `Uniform` storage class
- Entry point function name must be "main"

**Write ONLY the complete SPIR-V assembly text.** Do not include any other text or explanation
outside the SPIR-V text.


**Task:** Output a solid red color (vec4(1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0)).
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Write GPU fragment shaders in raw SPIR-V assembly — the low-level instruction set that graphics cards actually execute. Each subpass asks for a different visual effect (lighting, patterns, fractals) rendered onto a 3D sphere, and the output image is compared pixel-by-pixel against a reference.

This is the hardest shader-language test because SPIR-V assembly is essentially GPU machine code: every operation, type declaration, and memory access must be spelled out by hand.

SPIR-V Shader - Lambertian Diffuse

View SPIR-V (3039 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Gemini
; Bound: 100

OpCapability Shader
%glsl_ext = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %outColor %normal %worldPos %ubo
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Debug Information
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %outColor "outColor"
OpName %normal "normal"
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %UBO "UBO"
OpMemberName %UBO 0 "model"
OpMemberName %UBO 1 "view"
OpMemberName %UBO 2 "projection"
OpMemberName %UBO 3 "lightPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 4 "cameraPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 5 "params"
OpName %ubo "ubo"

; Decorations
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0 ; As specified in prompt
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

; Types, Constants, and Variables
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%f32 = OpTypeFloat 32
%u32 = OpTypeInt 32 0
%v3float = OpTypeVector %f32 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %f32 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

; UBO Struct Type
%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float

; Pointer Types
%fn_void = OpTypeFunction %void
%ptr_out_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_in_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%ptr_uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

; Constants
%const_f32_0 = OpConstant %f32 0.0
%const_f32_1 = OpConstant %f32 1.0
%const_u32_3 = OpConstant %u32 3
%const_u32_0 = OpConstant %u32 0
%const_u32_1 = OpConstant %u32 1
%const_u32_2 = OpConstant %u32 2

; Variables
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_v4float Output
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_in_v3float Input
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_in_v3float Input
%ubo = OpVariable %ptr_uniform_UBO Uniform

; Main Function
%main = OpFunction %void None %fn_void
%label = OpLabel

; Load inputs
%loaded_normal = OpLoad %v3float %normal
%loaded_worldPos = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos

; N = normalize(normal)
%N = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_ext Normalize %loaded_normal

; Get L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - worldPos)
; 1. Get lightPos from UBO
%lightPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_uniform_v4float %ubo %const_u32_3
%loaded_lightPos = OpLoad %v4float %lightPos_ptr
; 2. Extract .xyz from lightPos
%lightPos_xyz = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %loaded_lightPos %loaded_lightPos 0 1 2
; 3. Subtract worldPos
%L_unnormalized = OpFSub %v3float %lightPos_xyz %loaded_worldPos
; 4. Normalize L
%L = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl_ext Normalize %L_unnormalized

; d = max(dot(N, L), 0)
; 1. dot(N, L)
%dot_val = OpDot %f32 %N %L
; 2. max(dot, 0)
%d = OpExtInst %f32 %glsl_ext FMax %dot_val %const_f32_0

; Construct output color: vec4(d, d, d, 1.0)
%final_color_vec = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %d %d %d %const_f32_1

; Store output
OpStore %outColor %final_color_vec

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

SPIR-V Shader - Phong Specular

View SPIR-V (3437 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Gemini
; Bound: 100
OpCapability Shader
%glsl = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %worldPos %normal %outColor %ubo
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Decorations
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %ubo Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 192 ; lightPos
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 208 ; cameraPos
OpDecorate %ubo_var DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo_var Binding 0

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%int = OpTypeInt 32 0
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4

%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

; UBO struct
%UBO = OpTypeStruct %v4float %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO

; Function type for main
%main_fn_type = OpTypeFunction %void

; Constants
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
%float_0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_0_8 = OpConstant %float 0.8
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_32 = OpConstant %float 32.0
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1

; Input/Output Variables
%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output

; Uniform Variables
%ubo_var = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform
%lightPos_ptr = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%cameraPos_ptr = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %main_fn_type
%main_label = OpLabel

; Load Inputs
%1 = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
%2 = OpLoad %v3float %normal

; Get pointers to UBO members
%3 = OpAccessChain %lightPos_ptr %ubo_var %int_0
%4 = OpAccessChain %cameraPos_ptr %ubo_var %int_1

; Load UBO members
%5 = OpLoad %v4float %3 ; lightPos
%6 = OpLoad %v4float %4 ; cameraPos

; Extract xyz components
%lightPos_xyz = OpCompositeExtract %v3float %5 0 1 2
%cameraPos_xyz = OpCompositeExtract %v3float %6 0 1 2

; Normalize N
%N = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Normalize %2

; Calculate L = normalize(lightPos - worldPos)
%L_vec = OpFSub %v3float %lightPos_xyz %1
%L = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Normalize %L_vec

; Calculate V = normalize(cameraPos - worldPos)
%V_vec = OpFSub %v3float %cameraPos_xyz %1
%V = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Normalize %V_vec

; Calculate diffuse term: max(dot(N, L), 0.0)
%dot_N_L = OpDot %float %N %L
%diffuse = OpExtInst %float %glsl FMax %dot_N_L %float_0

; Calculate R = reflect(-L, N)
%neg_L = OpFNegate %v3float %L
%R = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Reflect %neg_L %N

; Calculate specular term: pow(max(dot(R, V), 0.0), 32)
%dot_R_V = OpDot %float %R %V
%spec_base = OpExtInst %float %glsl FMax %dot_R_V %float_0
%specular = OpPow %float %spec_base %float_32

; Calculate final intensity: 0.2 + 0.5*diffuse + 0.8*specular
%diffuse_comp = OpFMul %float %float_0_5 %diffuse
%specular_comp = OpFMul %float %float_0_8 %specular
%intensity_1 = OpFAdd %float %float_0_2 %diffuse_comp
%intensity = OpFAdd %float %intensity_1 %specular_comp

; Construct output color
%final_color_rgb = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %intensity %intensity %intensity
%final_color = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %final_color_rgb %float_1

; Store output
OpStore %outColor %final_color

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Gemini
; Bound: 100
OpCapability Shader
%1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %outColor %worldPos %normal %cameraPos_var
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %outColor "outColor"
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %normal "normal"

OpMemberName %UBO 0 "model"
OpMemberName %UBO 1 "view"
OpMemberName %UBO 2 "projection"
OpMemberName %UBO 3 "lightPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 4 "cameraPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 5 "params"
OpName %ubo "ubo"
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%_ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%int = OpTypeInt 32 0
%int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%int_2 = OpConstant %int 2
%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4

; Constants
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1
%float_3 = OpConstant %float 3
%float_0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%float_0_3 = OpConstant %float 0.3
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_0_8 = OpConstant %float 0.8
%const_base_color = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_2 %float_0_3 %float_0_8
%const_rim_tint = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_1 %float_0_8 %float_0_5
%const_one_vec = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_1 %float_1 %float_1

; Variables
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output
%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%ubo = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

; Main function
%main = OpTypeFunction %void
%main_func = OpFunction %void None %main
%main_label = OpLabel

; Load inputs
%15 = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
%16 = OpLoad %v3float %normal
%17 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %ubo %int_4
%18 = OpLoad %v4float %17 ; cameraPos
%19 = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %ubo %int_3
%20 = OpLoad %v4float %19 ; lightPos

; N = normalize(normal)
%N = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %16

; V = normalize(cameraPos.xyz - worldPos)
%cameraPos_xyz = OpCompositeExtract %v3float %18 0 1 2
%viewVec = OpFSub %v3float %cameraPos_xyz %15
%V = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %viewVec

; dotNV = dot(N, V)
%dotNV = OpDot %float %N %V

; rim = pow(1 - max(dot(N,V),0), 3)
%max_dotNV = OpFMax %float %dotNV %float_0
%one_minus_max = OpFSub %float %float_1 %max_dotNV
%rim = OpPow %float %one_minus_max %float_3

; L = normalize(lightPos.xyz - worldPos)
%lightPos_xyz = OpCompositeExtract %v3float %20 0 1 2
%lightVec = OpFSub %v3float %lightPos_xyz %15
%L = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %lightVec

; diffuse = max(dot(N, L), 0)
%dotNL = OpDot %float %N %L
%diffuse = OpFMax %float %dotNL %float_0

; base = base_color * (0.3 + 0.5*diffuse)
%diffuse_mod = OpFMul %float %float_0_5 %diffuse
%factor = OpFAdd %float %float_0_3 %diffuse_mod
%base = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %const_base_color %factor

; rimColor = rim_tint * rim
%rim_color = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %const_rim_tint %rim

; finalColor = base + rimColor
%final_rgb = OpFAdd %v3float %base %rim_color

; Output alpha 1.0
%final_color = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %final_rgb %float_1
OpStore %outColor %final_color

OpFunctionEnd

; Version: 1.0

OpCapability Shader
%1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %outColor %normal %worldPos %color
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Debug Information
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %outColor "outColor"
OpName %normal "normal"
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %color "color"
OpName %UBO "UBO"
OpMemberName %UBO 0 "model"
OpMemberName %UBO 1 "view"
OpMemberName %UBO 2 "projection"
OpMemberName %UBO 3 "lightPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 4 "cameraPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 5 "params"
OpName %ubo "ubo"

; Annotations
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 2
OpDecorate %color Location 3
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO

%main_fn = OpTypeFunction %void

; Constants
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
%float_0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%float_0_25 = OpConstant %float 0.25
%float_0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
%float_0_75 = OpConstant %float 0.75
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%int_3 = OpConstant %float 3

; Variables
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output
%normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%color = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%ubo = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

%main = OpFunction %void None %main_fn
%label = OpLabel

; Load inputs
%20 = OpLoad %v3float %normal
%21 = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
%22 = OpLoad %v3float %color

; Get light position
%lightPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %ubo %int_3
%lightPos_v4 = OpLoad %v4float %lightPos_ptr
%lightPos_v3 = OpCompositeExtract %v3float %lightPos_v4 0 1 2

; Calculate light vector L
%sub = OpFSub %v3float %lightPos_v3 %21
%L = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %sub

; Normalize normal vector N
%N = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %20

; Calculate dot product
%dot_val = OpDot %float %N %L

; d = max(dot(N,L), 0)
%d = OpExtInst %float %1 FMax %dot_val %float_0

; Quantize d
%cmp1 = OpFOrdGreaterThan %bool %d %float_0_75
%band1 = OpSelect %float %cmp1 %float_1 %float_0_7

%cmp2 = OpFOrdGreaterThan %bool %d %float_0_5
%res2 = OpSelect %float %cmp2 %band1 %float_0_4

%cmp3 = OpFOrdGreaterThan %bool %d %float_0_25
%quantized_d = OpSelect %float %cmp3 %res2 %float_0_2

; Multiply vertex color by quantized value
%toonColor = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %22 %quantized_d

; Final color with alpha = 1.0
%finalColor = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %toonColor %float_1

OpStore %outColor %finalColor
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Input_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO

%func = OpTypeFunction %void

; Constants
%c_float_0_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%c_float_0_2 = OpConstant %float 0.2
%c_float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%c_float_0_9 = OpConstant %float 0.9
%c_float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%c_float_2_0 = OpConstant %float 2.0
%c_float_8_0 = OpConstant %float 8.0
%c_uint_3 = OpConstant %uint 3
%c_v2float_8 = OpConstantComposite %v2float %c_float_8_0 %c_float_8_0

; Variables
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output
%uv = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v2float Input
%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%tangent = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%color = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%ubo = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %func
%label = OpLabel

; Checkerboard
%uv_val = OpLoad %v2float %uv
%uv_scaled = OpFMul %v2float %uv_val %c_v2float_8
%uv_floor = OpFloor %v2float %uv_scaled
%uv_floor_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %uv_floor 0
%uv_floor_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %uv_floor 1
%sum_uv_floor = OpFAdd %float %uv_floor_x %uv_floor_y
%mod_val = OpFRem %float %sum_uv_floor %c_float_2_0
%is_even = OpFOrdEqual %bool %mod_val %c_float_0_0
%checker_color_val = OpSelect %float %is_even %c_float_0_9 %c_float_0_2
%checker_color = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %checker_color_val %checker_color_val %checker_color_val

; Lambertian Shading
%normal_val = OpLoad %v3float %normal
%worldPos_val = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
%lightPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %ubo %c_uint_3
%lightPos_val = OpLoad %v4float %lightPos_ptr
%lightPos_xyz = OpCompositeExtract %float %lightPos_val 0
%lightPos_xyz_1 = OpCompositeExtract %float %lightPos_val 1
%lightPos_xyz_2 = OpCompositeExtract %float %lightPos_val 2
%lightPos_v3 = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %lightPos_xyz %lightPos_xyz_1 %lightPos_xyz_2

%normalized_normal = OpExtInst %v3float %1 GLSL.std.450 Normalize %normal_val
%light_dir = OpFSub %v3float %lightPos_v3 %worldPos_val
%normalized_light_dir = OpExtInst %v3float %1 GLSL.std.450 Normalize %light_dir
%dot_product = OpDot %float %normalized_normal %normalized_light_dir
%diffuse = OpExtInst %float %1 GLSL.std.450 FMax %c_float_0_0 %dot_product

; Final Color
%lambert_factor_mul = OpFMul %float %c_float_0_5 %diffuse
%lambert_factor = OpFAdd %float %c_float_0_5 %lambert_factor_mul
%shaded_color = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %checker_color %lambert_factor
%final_color = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %shaded_color %c_float_1_0
OpStore %outColor %final_color

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Gemini
OpCapability Shader
%1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %outColor %uv %normal %worldPos
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Debug Information
OpSource GLSL 450

; Names
OpName %main "main"
OpName %outColor "outColor"
OpName %uv "uv"
OpName %normal "normal"
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %UBO "UBO"
OpMemberName %UBO 0 "model"
OpMemberName %UBO 1 "view"
OpMemberName %UBO 2 "projection"
OpMemberName %UBO 3 "lightPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 4 "cameraPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 5 "params"
OpName %ubo "ubo"

; Decorations
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %uv Location 2
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%int = OpTypeInt 32 0
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Input_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float

%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%_ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

%bool = OpTypeBool

%main_type = OpTypeFunction %void

; Constants
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
%float_0_9 = OpConstant %float 0.9
%float_0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
%float_0_6 = OpConstant %float 0.6
%float_16 = OpConstant %float 16.0
%float_pi = OpConstant %float 3.14159

%int_3 = OpConstant %int 3

%color_red = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_9 %float_0_1 %float_0_1
%color_blue = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_1 %float_0_1 %float_0_9


; Global Variables
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output
%uv = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v2float Input
%normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%ubo = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

%main = OpFunction %void None %main_type
%label = OpLabel

; --- Stripe Logic ---
%uv_val = OpLoad %v2float %uv
%uv_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %uv_val 1
%pi_mul_16 = OpFMul %float %float_pi %float_16
%y_mul_pi16 = OpFMul %float %uv_y %pi_mul_16
%sin_val = OpExtInst %float %1 Sin %y_mul_pi16
%is_neg = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %sin_val %float_0
%stripe_color = OpSelect %v3float %is_neg %color_blue %color_red

; --- Shading Logic ---
; Get lightPos
%lightPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %ubo %int_3
%lightPos_val = OpLoad %v4float %lightPos_ptr
%lightPos_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %lightPos_val 0
%lightPos_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %lightPos_val 1
%lightPos_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %lightPos_val 2
%lightPos_xyz = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %lightPos_x %lightPos_y %lightPos_z

; Calculate lightDir and normalize
%worldPos_val = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
%lightDir = OpFSub %v3float %lightPos_xyz %worldPos_val
%norm_lightDir = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %lightDir

; Normalize normal
%normal_val = OpLoad %v3float %normal
%norm_normal = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Normalize %normal_val

; Dot product
%dot_product = OpDot %float %norm_normal %norm_lightDir
%diffuse_raw = OpExtInst %float %1 FMax %dot_product %float_0

; --- Final Combination ---
; lambert = 0.4 + 0.6 * diffuse
%diffuse_scaled = OpFMul %float %float_0_6 %diffuse_raw
%lambert = OpFAdd %float %float_0_4 %diffuse_scaled
%lambert_vec = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %lambert %lambert %lambert

; final_color = stripe_color * lambert
%final_rgb = OpFMul %v3float %stripe_color %lambert_vec
%final_color = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %final_rgb %float_1

OpStore %outColor %final_color

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Gemini
; Bound: 100

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %outColor %uv %worldPos %normal
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Debug Information
OpName %main "main"
OpName %outColor "outColor"
OpName %uv "uv"
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %normal "normal"
OpName %UBO "UBO"
OpMemberName %UBO 0 "model"
OpMemberName %UBO 1 "view"
OpMemberName %UBO 2 "projection"
OpMemberName %UBO 3 "lightPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 4 "cameraPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 5 "params"
OpName %ubo "ubo"

; Decorations
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %uv Location 2
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%int = OpTypeInt 32 0
%float2 = OpTypeVector %float 2
%float3 = OpTypeVector %float 3
%float4 = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %float4 4

%ptr_out_float4 = OpTypePointer Output %float4
%ptr_in_float2 = OpTypePointer Input %float2
%ptr_in_float3 = OpTypePointer Input %float3

%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %float4 %float4 %float4
%ptr_uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%ptr_uniform_float4 = OpTypePointer Uniform %float4

%main_func = OpTypeFunction %void

; Constants
%const_int_3 = OpConstant %int 3
%const_float_0 = OpConstant %float 0.0
%const_float_1 = OpConstant %float 1.0
%const_float_0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
%const_float_0_3 = OpConstant %float 0.3
%const_float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%const_float_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
%const_float_0_8 = OpConstant %float 0.8
%const_float_6 = OpConstant %float 6.0

%const_float2_0_5 = OpConstantComposite %float2 %const_float_0_5 %const_float_0_5
%yellow = OpConstantComposite %float3 %const_float_1 %const_float_0_8 %const_float_0
%dark_blue = OpConstantComposite %float3 %const_float_0_1 %const_float_0_1 %const_float_0_3

; Variables
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_float4 Output
%uv = OpVariable %ptr_in_float2 Input
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_in_float3 Input
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_in_float3 Input
%ubo = OpVariable %ptr_uniform_UBO Uniform

%main = OpFunction %void None %main_func
%label = OpLabel

; Polka-dot pattern
%uv_val = OpLoad %float2 %uv
%scaled_uv = OpFMul %float2 %uv_val %const_float_6
%fract_uv = OpFract %float2 %scaled_uv
%cell_center = OpFSub %float2 %fract_uv %const_float2_0_5
%dist = OpLength %float2 %cell_center
%in_dot = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %dist %const_float_0_3
%pattern_color = OpSelect %float3 %in_dot %yellow %dark_blue

; Lambertian shading
%normal_val = OpLoad %float3 %normal
%norm_normal = OpNormalize %float3 %normal_val
%worldPos_val = OpLoad %float3 %worldPos

; Get lightPos from UBO
%lightPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %ptr_uniform_float4 %ubo %const_int_3
%lightPos_vec4 = OpLoad %float4 %lightPos_ptr
%lightPos_vec3 = OpCompositeExtract %float3 %lightPos_vec4 0 1 2

%light_dir = OpFSub %float3 %lightPos_vec3 %worldPos_val
%norm_light_dir = OpNormalize %float3 %light_dir

%diffuse_dot = OpDot %float3 %norm_normal %norm_light_dir
%diffuse = OpFMax %float %diffuse_dot %const_float_0
%shade_factor = OpFAdd %float %const_float_0_3 (OpFMul %float %const_float_0_7 %diffuse)

%shaded_rgb = OpVectorTimesScalar %float3 %pattern_color %shade_factor
%final_color = OpCompositeConstruct %float4 %shaded_rgb %const_float_1
OpStore %outColor %final_color

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

OpMemberName %UBO 4 "cameraPos"

OpDecorate %normal Location 1

OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64

OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %UBO DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %UBO Binding 0

%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

%_ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%_ptr_Input_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%_ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float
%_ptr_Uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO

%func = OpTypeFunction %void

; Constants
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_0_3 = OpConstant %float 0.3
%skyColor = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_4 %float_0_6 %float_1
%groundColor = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_3 %float_0_15 %float_0_05
%int_3 = OpConstant %v4float 3
%float_0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
%float_0_6 = OpConstant %float 0.6
%float_0_15 = OpConstant %float 0.15
%float_0_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05

; Variables
%outColor = OpVariable %_ptr_Output_v4float Output
%normal = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%worldPos = OpVariable %_ptr_Input_v3float Input
%ubo = OpVariable %_ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

; Main Function
%main = OpFunction %void None %func
%label = OpLabel

; Load and normalize the normal
%10 = OpLoad %v3float %normal
%11 = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %10 %10 0 1 2
%12 = OpFNegate %v3float %11
%norm = OpFNormalize %v3float %12

; Hemisphere ambient lighting
%13 = OpCompositeExtract %float %norm 1
%blend = OpFAdd %float %float_0_5 %13
%14 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %skyColor %blend
%15 = OpFSub %float %float_1 %blend
%16 = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %groundColor %15
%ambient = OpFAdd %v3float %14 %16

; Diffuse lighting
%lightPosPtr = OpAccessChain %_ptr_Uniform_v4float %ubo %int_3
%lightPos = OpLoad %v4float %lightPosPtr
%17 = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
%18 = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %lightPos %lightPos 0 1 2
%lightDir = OpFSub %v3float %18 %17
%normLightDir = OpFNormalize %v3float %lightDir
%dot = OpDot %v3float %norm %normLightDir
%d = OpFMax %float %dot %float_0
%diffuse = OpFMul %float %d %float_0_3

; Final color
%19 = OpCompositeConstruct %v3float %diffuse %diffuse %diffuse
%20 = OpFAdd %v3float %ambient %19
%finalColor = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %20 %float_1

OpStore %outColor %finalColor

OpFunctionEnd

%float_1_0 = OpConstant %float 1

%float_0_7 = OpConstant %float 0.7
%float_0_8 = OpConstant %float 0.8

%main_ty = OpTypeFunction %void

%entry = OpLabel

%dot = OpDot %float %normalized_normal %normalized_to_light

%diffuse_scaled = OpFMul %float %diffuse_unclamped %float_0_7

%fog_factor_unclamped = OpFSub %float %dist %float_1_5
%fog_factor_div = OpFDiv %float %fog_factor_unclamped %float_3_0
%fog_factor = OpExtInst %float %1 Clamp %fog_factor_div %float_0_0 %float_1_0

%mixed_color = OpExtInst %v3float %1 Mix %lambertian_color %fogColor %fog_factor

%final_color = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %mixed_color %float_1_0
OpStore %outColor %final_color

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

%void          = OpTypeVoid
%float         = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float       = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float       = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4          = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4
%int           = OpTypeInt 32 0
%UBO           = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float

%ptr_Output_v4float  = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_Input_v3float   = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%ptr_Uniform_UBO     = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%ptr_Uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float
%void_fn             = OpTypeFunction %void

%float_0_5     = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_1_0     = OpConstant %float 1.0
%float_0_2     = OpConstant %float 0.2
%float_0_75    = OpConstant %float 0.75
%coolColor     = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_2 %float_0_2 %float_0_75
%float_0_7     = OpConstant %float 0.7
%float_0_4     = OpConstant %float 0.4
%warmColor     = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0_7 %float_0_7 %float_0_4
%int_3         = OpConstant %int 3

%outColor      = OpVariable %ptr_Output_v4float Output
%worldPos      = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float Input
%normal        = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v3float Input
%ubo           = OpVariable %ptr_Uniform_UBO Uniform

%main          = OpFunction %void None %void_fn
%label         = OpLabel

%loaded_worldPos = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
%loaded_normal = OpLoad %v3float %normal

%N             = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Normalize %loaded_normal

%lightPos_ptr  = OpAccessChain %ptr_Uniform_v4float %ubo %int_3
%loaded_lightPos = OpLoad %v4float %lightPos_ptr
%lightPos_xyz  = OpVectorShuffle %v3float %loaded_lightPos %loaded_lightPos 0 1 2

%lightDir      = OpFSub %v3float %lightPos_xyz %loaded_worldPos
%L             = OpExtInst %v3float %glsl Normalize %lightDir

%dot_N_L       = OpDot %float %N %L

%t_mul         = OpFMul %float %dot_N_L %float_0_5
%t             = OpFAdd %float %t_mul %float_0_5

%one_minus_t   = OpFSub %float %float_1_0 %t

%cool_term     = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %coolColor %one_minus_t
%warm_term     = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %warmColor %t
%final_rgb     = OpFAdd %v3float %cool_term %warm_term

%final_color   = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %final_rgb %float_1_0

               OpStore %outColor %final_color

               OpReturn
               OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Gemini CLI
; Bound: 100
OpCapability Shader
%1 = OpExtInstImport "GLSL.std.450"
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %outColor %uv
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Annotations
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %uv Location 2

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%10 = OpTypeFunction %void
%bool = OpTypeBool
%int = OpTypeInt 32 1
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4

%ptr_Output_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_Input_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%ptr_Function_int = OpTypePointer Function %int
%ptr_Function_v2float = OpTypePointer Function %v2float

; Constants
%c_int_0 = OpConstant %int 0
%c_int_1 = OpConstant %int 1
%c_int_20 = OpConstant %int 20
%c_float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
%c_float_1 = OpConstant %float 1
%c_float_2 = OpConstant %float 2
%c_float_3 = OpConstant %float 3
%c_float_4 = OpConstant %float 4
%c_float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%c_float_20 = OpConstant %float 20
%c_v2_zero = OpConstantComposite %v2float %c_float_0 %c_float_0

; Variables
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_Output_v4float Output
%uv = OpVariable %ptr_Input_v2float Input

; Main Function
%main = OpFunction %void None %10
%entry = OpLabel

; Local variables
%iter = OpVariable %ptr_Function_int Function
%z = OpVariable %ptr_Function_v2float Function
OpStore %iter %c_int_0
OpStore %z %c_v2_zero

; Calculate c from uv
%uv_val = OpLoad %v2float %uv
%uv_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %uv_val 0
%uv_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %uv_val 1
%cx_mul = OpFMul %float %uv_x %c_float_3
%cx = OpFSub %float %cx_mul %c_float_2
%cy_mul = OpFMul %float %uv_y %c_float_2
%cy = OpFSub %float %cy_mul %c_float_1

OpBranch %loop_header

%loop_header = OpLabel
%iter_val = OpLoad %int %iter
%z_val = OpLoad %v2float %z

%loop_cond = OpSLessThan %bool %iter_val %c_int_20

OpLoopMerge %loop_merge %loop_continue
OpBranchConditional %loop_cond %loop_body %loop_merge

%loop_body = OpLabel
%zx = OpCompositeExtract %float %z_val 0
%zy = OpCompositeExtract %float %z_val 1

; Check escape condition: |z|^2 > 4
%zx_sq = OpFMul %float %zx %zx
%zy_sq = OpFMul %float %zy %zy
%z_mag_sq = OpFAdd %float %zx_sq %zy_sq
%escape_cond = OpFGreaterThan %bool %z_mag_sq %c_float_4
OpBranchConditional %escape_cond %loop_merge %no_escape

%no_escape = OpLabel
; z = z*z + c
; z' = (zx^2 - zy^2 + cx, 2*zx*zy + cy)
%new_zx_part1 = OpFSub %float %zx_sq %zy_sq
%new_zx = OpFAdd %float %new_zx_part1 %cx
%new_zy_part1 = OpFMul %float %zx %zy
%new_zy_part2 = OpFMul %float %new_zy_part1 %c_float_2
%new_zy = OpFAdd %float %new_zy_part2 %cy
%new_z = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %new_zx %new_zy
OpStore %z %new_z
OpBranch %loop_continue

%loop_continue = OpLabel
%next_iter = OpIAdd %int %iter_val %c_int_1
OpStore %iter %next_iter
OpBranch %loop_header

%loop_merge = OpLabel
%final_iter_val = OpLoad %int %iter
%t_float = OpConvertSToF %float %final_iter_val
%t = OpFDiv %float %t_float %c_float_20

; color = (t, t * 0.5, 1.0 - t, 1.0)
%color_g = OpFMul %float %t %c_float_0_5
%color_b = OpFSub %float %c_float_1 %t
%final_color = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %t %color_g %color_b %c_float_1
OpStore %outColor %final_color

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Gemini
; Bound: 100

OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %outColor %uv %normal %worldPos
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Debug Information
OpSource GLSL 450
OpName %main "main"
OpName %outColor "outColor"
OpName %uv "uv"
OpName %normal "normal"
OpName %worldPos "worldPos"
OpName %UBO "UBO"
OpMemberName %UBO 0 "model"
OpMemberName %UBO 1 "view"
OpMemberName %UBO 2 "projection"
OpMemberName %UBO 3 "lightPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 4 "cameraPos"
OpMemberName %UBO 5 "params"
OpName %ubo "ubo"

; Decorations
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %uv Location 2
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0

OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 MatrixStride 16
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 ColMajor
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %ubo DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo Binding 0

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%uint = OpTypeInt 32 0

%v2float = OpTypeVector %float 2
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

%ptr_out_v4float = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%ptr_in_v2float = OpTypePointer Input %v2float
%ptr_in_v3float = OpTypePointer Input %v3float

%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float
%ptr_ubo = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%ptr_uniform_v4float = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

%func = OpTypeFunction %void

; Constants
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1
%float_0_05 = OpConstant %float 0.05
%float_0_1 = OpConstant %float 0.1
%float_0_4 = OpConstant %float 0.4
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_0_6 = OpConstant %float 0.6
%float_2 = OpConstant %float 2
%float_8 = OpConstant %float 8
%float_16 = OpConstant %float 16

%v2_brick_scale = OpConstantComposite %v2float %float_8 %float_16
%brick_color = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float 0.7 %float 0.2 %float 0.1
%mortar_color = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float 0.7 %float 0.7 %float 0.7

%int_3 = OpConstant %uint 3 ; Member index for lightPos in UBO

; Variables
%outColor = OpVariable %ptr_out_v4float Output
%uv = OpVariable %ptr_in_v2float Input
%normal = OpVariable %ptr_in_v3float Input
%worldPos = OpVariable %ptr_in_v3float Input
%ubo = OpVariable %ptr_ubo Uniform

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %func
%label = OpLabel

; --- Brick Pattern ---
%uv_val = OpLoad %v2float %uv
%scaled_uv = OpFMul %v2float %uv_val %v2_brick_scale
%scaled_uv_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %scaled_uv 1
%row = OpConvertFToS %uint %scaled_uv_y
%is_odd_row_rem = OpSMod %uint %row %uint 2
%is_odd_row = OpIEqual %bool %is_odd_row_rem %uint 1

%offset_uv = OpVariable %v2float Function
OpStore %offset_uv %scaled_uv
OpSelectionMerge %merge_row None
OpBranchConditional %is_odd_row %odd_row %even_row

%odd_row = OpLabel
%current_uv_odd = OpLoad %v2float %offset_uv
%offset_x_odd = OpFAdd %float %float_0_5 %float_0
%offset_vec_odd = OpCompositeConstruct %v2float %offset_x_odd %float_0
%offset_uv_odd = OpFAdd %v2float %current_uv_odd %offset_vec_odd
OpStore %offset_uv %offset_uv_odd
OpBranch %merge_row

%even_row = OpLabel
OpBranch %merge_row

%merge_row = OpLabel
%final_offset_uv = OpLoad %v2float %offset_uv
%brick_uv = OpFract %v2float %final_offset_uv

%brick_uv_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %brick_uv 0
%brick_uv_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %brick_uv 1

%in_mortar_x = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %brick_uv_x %float_0_05
%in_mortar_y = OpFOrdLessThan %bool %brick_uv_y %float_0_1
%in_mortar = OpLogicalOr %bool %in_mortar_x %in_mortar_y

%base_color = OpSelect %v3float %in_mortar %mortar_color %brick_color

; --- Shading ---
%norm_vec = OpLoad %v3float %normal
%world_pos_vec = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos

%ptr_lightPos = OpAccessChain %ptr_uniform_v4float %ubo %int_3
%light_pos_w = OpLoad %v4float %ptr_lightPos
%light_pos_vec = OpCompositeExtract %v3float %light_pos_w 0

%N = OpNormalize %v3float %norm_vec
%light_dir = OpFSub %v3float %light_pos_vec %world_pos_vec
%L = OpNormalize %v3float %light_dir
%diffuse_dot = OpDot %float %N %L
%diffuse = OpExtInst %float %float_1 FMax %float_0 %diffuse_dot

%lambert_factor_mul = OpFMul %float %diffuse %float_0_6
%lambert_factor = OpFAdd %float %lambert_factor_mul %float_0_4

%shaded_color = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %base_color %lambert_factor
%final_color = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %shaded_color %shaded_color %shaded_color %float_1
%final_color_x = OpCompositeExtract %float %shaded_color 0
%final_color_y = OpCompositeExtract %float %shaded_color 1
%final_color_z = OpCompositeExtract %float %shaded_color 2
%final_out_color = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %final_color_x %final_color_y %final_color_z %float_1

OpStore %outColor %final_out_color
OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

SPIR-V Shader - Fresnel Heatmap

View SPIR-V (3098 chars)
; SPIR-V
; Version: 1.0
; Generator: Gemini
; Bound: 100
OpCapability Shader
OpMemoryModel Logical GLSL450
OpEntryPoint Fragment %main "main" %normal %worldPos %outColor %cameraPos_ptr
OpExecutionMode %main OriginUpperLeft

; Decorations
OpDecorate %normal Location 1
OpDecorate %worldPos Location 0
OpDecorate %outColor Location 0
OpDecorate %UBO Block
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 0 Offset 0
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 1 Offset 64
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 2 Offset 128
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 3 Offset 192
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 4 Offset 208
OpMemberDecorate %UBO 5 Offset 224
OpDecorate %ubo_var DescriptorSet 0
OpDecorate %ubo_var Binding 0

; Types
%void = OpTypeVoid
%bool = OpTypeBool
%float = OpTypeFloat 32
%v3float = OpTypeVector %float 3
%v4float = OpTypeVector %float 4
%mat4 = OpTypeMatrix %v4float 4

%fp_input_v3 = OpTypePointer Input %v3float
%fp_output_v4 = OpTypePointer Output %v4float
%fp_uniform_v4 = OpTypePointer Uniform %v4float

%UBO = OpTypeStruct %mat4 %mat4 %mat4 %v4float %v4float %v4float
%fp_uniform_UBO = OpTypePointer Uniform %UBO
%int = OpTypeInt 32 0
%int_4 = OpConstant %int 4

%func = OpTypeFunction %void

; Constants
%float_0 = OpConstant %float 0
%float_0_5 = OpConstant %float 0.5
%float_1 = OpConstant %float 1
%float_2 = OpConstant %float 2

; Variables
%normal = OpVariable %fp_input_v3 Input
%worldPos = OpVariable %fp_input_v3 Input
%outColor = OpVariable %fp_output_v4 Output
%ubo_var = OpVariable %fp_uniform_UBO Uniform
%cameraPos_ptr = OpAccessChain %fp_uniform_v4 %ubo_var %int_4

; Main function
%main = OpFunction %void None %func
%main_label = OpLabel

; Load inputs
%loaded_normal = OpLoad %v3float %normal
%loaded_worldPos = OpLoad %v3float %worldPos
%loaded_cameraPos_v4 = OpLoad %v4float %cameraPos_ptr
%loaded_cameraPos_v3 = OpCompositeExtract %v3float %loaded_cameraPos_v4 0 1 2

; Normalize N
%N = OpFNegate %v3float %loaded_normal
%N_normalized = OpVectorNormalize %v3float %N

; Calculate V = normalize(cameraPos - worldPos)
%view_vec = OpFSub %v3float %loaded_cameraPos_v3 %loaded_worldPos
%V = OpVectorNormalize %v3float %view_vec

; Calculate NdotV = max(dot(N, V), 0)
%dot_NV = OpDot %float %N_normalized %V
%NdotV = OpExtInst %float %1 FMax %dot_NV %float_0

; --- Conditional coloring ---
%cond = OpFUnordLessThan %bool %NdotV %float_0_5
OpSelectionMerge %merge_label None
OpBranchConditional %cond %if_less_label %if_ge_label

%if_less_label = OpLabel
; r = 1, g = 2 * NdotV, b = 0
%g_less = OpFMul %float %float_2 %NdotV
%color_less = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %float_1 %g_less %float_0 %float_1
OpBranch %merge_label

%if_ge_label = OpLabel
; r = g = 1 - (NdotV - 0.5) * 2
; b = (NdotV - 0.5) * 2
%temp_sub = OpFSub %float %NdotV %float_0_5
%b_ge = OpFMul %float %float_2 %temp_sub
%rg_subpart = OpFMul %float %temp_sub %float_2
%rg_ge = OpFSub %float %float_1 %rg_subpart
%color_ge = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %rg_ge %rg_ge %b_ge %float_1
OpBranch %merge_label

%merge_label = OpLabel
%final_color = OpPhi %v4float %color_less %if_less_label %color_ge %if_ge_label

; Store output
OpStore %outColor %final_color

OpReturn
OpFunctionEnd

%11 = OpLoad %v3float %normal

%13 = OpLoad %v4float %lightPos_ptr
%14 = OpLoad %v4float %cameraPos_ptr
%15 = OpCompositeExtract %v3float %13 0 1 2
%16 = OpCompositeExtract %v3float %14 0 1 2
%N = OpGLSLStd450Normalize %v3float %11
%L_unnormalized = OpFSub %v3float %15 %10
%L = OpGLSLStd450Normalize %v3float %L_unnormalized
%V_unnormalized = OpFSub %v3float %16 %10
%V = OpGLSLStd450Normalize %v3float %V_unnormalized
%N_dot_L = OpDot %float %N %L
%N_dot_L_clamped = OpFMax %float %N_dot_L %float_0
%diffuse_term = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %12 %N_dot_L_clamped
%neg_L = OpFNegate %v3float %L

%R_dot_V = OpDot %float %R %V

%specular_power = OpPow %float %R_dot_V_clamped %shininess
%specular_term = OpVectorTimesScalar %v3float %white %specular_power
%phong = OpFAdd %v3float %ambient_color %diffuse_term
%phong = OpFAdd %v3float %phong %specular_term
%min_clamp = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_0 %float_0 %float_0
%max_clamp = OpConstantComposite %v3float %float_1 %float_1 %float_1
%final_rgb = OpFClamp %v3float %phong %min_clamp %max_clamp
%final_color = OpCompositeConstruct %v4float %final_rgb %float_1
